final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled food photography image of fashionable coffee and desserts in a Korean cafe setting, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe smartphone aesthetic with Instagram-story / rough-magazine-note overlay feel — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn white-pen annotations for each element in the scene, with arrows or dashed lines as visual guides connecting annotations to subjects
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as focal subjects — no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or cafe-table setting atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable, relaxed cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, muted-trendy Korean-cafe direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn overlay treatment — white pen lines, single-stroke rough style, slightly uneven weight, outline-tracing the edges of objects; moderate decorative accents (steam wisps, sparkles, small hearts, mini emoticons) with deliberate negative space preserved
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (平仮名7割・簡単な漢字3割) for each element — short, diary-like, self-murmuring tone:
  • drink annotation → taste / temperature / mood (e.g. 「すっきり」「やさしい甘さ」)
  • food annotation → texture / deliciousness (e.g. 「しっとり」「さいこう」)
  • space annotation → atmosphere (e.g. 「落ち着く」「いい時間」)
  • overall one-liner (e.g. 「しあわせすぎた〜」)
Constraints: must preserve the hand-drawn annotation layer as an integral visual element over the photo; annotations must feel like genuine handwritten notes, not printed type; decorative elements must be restrained — leave breathing room / negative space
Avoid: people, faces, overly polished digital lettering, cluttered or over-decorated annotation layer
